financials.note: Czech s.r.o. financial statements are filed in the Collection of Deeds (Sbírka listin) at justice.cz. They were not retrieved in this pass, so revenue, profit, assets, and headcount are NOT_FOUND here rather than estimated. The only hard figure is registered capital.
